metadata.summary: A trivia quiz game for the terminal

documentation:
# Quizzical

## Introduction

Quizzical is a terminal-based quiz game, using [The Open Trivia
Database](https://opentdb.com/) as the back end.

![Quizzical](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/davep/quizzical/main/images/quizzical.png)

## Installing

### pipx

The package can be installed using [`pipx`](https://pypa.github.io/pipx/):

```sh
$ pipx install quizzical
```

### Homebrew

The package is available via Homebrew. Use the following commands to install:

```sh
$ brew tap davep/homebrew
$ brew install quizzical
```

## Running

Once installed run the `quizzical` command.

## Playing the game

Hopefully the interface is pretty straightforward: run up the application,
use the `New` button to create a new quiz with your choice of parameters,
use the `Run` button to play a game. When you run a new game you'll be shown
the parameters:

![Starting a new quiz](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/davep/quizzical/main/images/start-quiz.png)

and once you start you'll be shown a series of questions; press keys
<kbd>1</kbd>, <kbd>2</kbd>, <kbd>3</kbd> or <kbd>4</kbd> to answer each one.

![An example question](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/davep/quizzical/main/images/question.png)

Once the quiz is over you can view your results and see which answers were
right and which were wrong:

![Viewing some results](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/davep/quizzical/main/images/results.png)

## Getting help

If you need help, or have any ideas, please feel free to [raise an
issue](https://github.com/davep/quizzical/issues) or [start a
discussion](https://github.com/davep/quizzical/discussions).

## TODO

Things I'm considering adding or addressing:

- [ ] Add session token support (less frequent question repeats).
- [ ] More quiz information in the main quiz list.
- [ ] Record scores for each game played, provide a history view.
- [ ] Allow answering a question with the mouse.

[//]: # (README.md ends here)

documentation: The description of the timer type.

documentation: No timer.

class_variables.name: quizzical.app.data.quiz_parameters.QuizTimer.PER_QUESTION
documentation: Timer per question.

class_variables.name: quizzical.app.data.quiz_parameters.QuizTimer.WHOLE_QUIZ
documentation: Timer for whole quiz.
The types of timer a quiz can have.

Gets the overall question counts.

Note:
    Because this is a low-importance value that won't change very
    often, the value is cached for the lifetime of the client
    object.

methods.name: quizzical.opentdb.client.OpenTriviaDB.category_counts

Gets the question counts per category.

    Because this is a low-importance value that won't change very
    often, the value is cached for the lifetime of the client
    object.

documentation: Exception raised if there are no results.

classes.name: quizzical.opentdb.response.InvalidParameter
documentation: Exception raised if there is an invalid parameter.

classes.name: quizzical.opentdb.response.TokenNotFound
documentation: Exception raised if the passed token isn't found.

classes.name: quizzical.opentdb.response.TokenEmpty
documentation: Exception raised if the given token has used all possible questions.

classes.name: quizzical.opentdb.response.RateLimit
documentation: Exception raised if there have been too many requests.

classes.name: quizzical.opentdb.response.Code

methods.name: quizzical.opentdb.response.Code.maybe_raise
documentation: Raise any appropriate exceptions based on the code.

class_variables.name: quizzical.opentdb.response.Code.UNKNOWN
documentation: The response code is so far unknown.

class_variables.name: quizzical.opentdb.response.Code.SUCCESS
documentation: Returned results successfully.

class_variables.name: quizzical.opentdb.response.Code.NO_RESULTS
quizzical.opentdb.response.Code.INVALID_PARAMETER
documentation:
Contains an invalid parameter.

Arguments passed in aren't valid. (Ex. Amount = Five)

class_variables.name: quizzical.opentdb.response.Code.TOKEN_NOT_FOUND
documentation: Session Token does not exist.

class_variables.name: quizzical.opentdb.response.Code.TOKEN_EMPTY
documentation:
Session Token has returned all possible questions for the specified query.

Resetting the Token is necessary.

class_variables.name: quizzical.opentdb.response.Code.RATE_LIMIT
documentation:
Too many requests have occurred.

Each IP can only access the API once every 5 seconds.
The response codes that the trivia API can send back.
